mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.product_id, r.order_item_id, r.content, r.created_at, u.user_id, u.user_name FROM review_tb r JOIN user_tb u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_tb WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, u.user_name AS userName, COALESCE(p.product_name, '상품정보없음') AS productName, oi.orders_id AS orderId, r.content AS content, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.admin_reply AS adminReply, r.admin_reply_created_at AS adminReplyCreatedAt, r.admin_reply_updated_at AS adminReplyUpdatedAt FROM review_tb r JOIN user_tb u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN order_item_tb oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id LEFT JOIN product_tb p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.review_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE review_tb SET admin_reply = #{adminReply}, admin_reply_created_at = CASE WHEN admin_reply_created_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE admin_reply_created_at END, admin_reply_updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
